summary: No close, merge, label, or comment mutations are safe from this pass. The closed representative #40248 is historical only. The live cluster splits into two narrow canonical subfamilies, #58993 for Google Chat DM/spaceType detection and #65058 for add-on lifecycle payload parsing, while broad PR #42330 still needs maintainer judgment because it mixes unique product decisions with broad auth/logging/mention/media changes.
